1.content:
(a) the Simpson's after Homer's last close call with almost causing a nuclear meltdown at the nuclear power plant.
(b) the Griffin's after Peter's last stunt causes everyone including his friends/neighbors to hate him to the point that they chase them out of Quahog.
1.title: Which family do you pick to be kicked out

11.content:
So after Homer almost caused a nuclear meltdown, he's fired from the nuclear plant. He's tries to find a new job, but gets fired from all of them and makes other Springfield citizens mad at him. The Simpson's soon find themselves kicked out of Springfield, and so they set out to find a new city to live in. So they keep searching how about this city, no your father got us banned from that city. When all of a sudden how did they end up in Quahog?

(a) they needed to use the restroom and their car got stolen. Who helps them out?
(b) they needed to fill the car's gas tank and went inside to get something to eat after the gas tank was filled. While they were eating their car got stolen. Who helps them out?
(c) Homer crashed the car just outside Quahog. Who helps them out?
(d) their car broke down just outside Quahog. Who helps them out?
(e) after Homer almost fell asleep while driving, Marge makes him get off the highway at the next exit. So the Quahog exit comes up and so Homer gets off at the Quahog exit. Then they drive around Quahog looking for a hotel but can't seem to find one that they can afford. Who helps them out?
11.title: (a)

12.content:
So after Peter buys a tank and ruins most of Quahog. The Griffin's find themselves kicked out of Quahog, and so they set out to find a new city to live in. So they keep searching how about this city, no your father got us banned from that city. When all of a sudden how did they end up in Springfield?

(a) they needed to use the restroom and their car got stolen. Who helps them out?
(b) they needed to fill the car's gas tank and went inside to get something to eat after the gas tank was filled. While they were eating their car got stolen. Who helps them out?
(c) Peter crashed the car just outside Springfield. Who helps them out?
(d) their car broke down just outside Springfield. Who helps them out?
(e) after Peter almost fell asleep while driving, Lois makes him get off the highway at the next exit. So the Springfield exit comes up and so Peter gets off at the Springfield exit. Then they drive around Springfield looking for a hotel but can't seem to find one that they can afford. Who helps them out?
12.title: (b)

info.brief_description: A story about how the Simpson's met the Griffin's was it in Quahog or Springfield.
info.description: Which cartoon family ends up in the other cartoon family's hometown. We'll find out who got kicked out of their hometown and ended up in either Springfield or Quahog.
